name: Skill1: 技能选择+利用+蒸馏三能力共进化的统一RL
content: single policy同时训练三能力, 共用task-outcome signal. low-frequency trend credits selection, high-frequency variation credits distillation(频域分解归功) | ALFWorld+WebShop超越prior skill-based和RL baselines. 训练动力学证实三能力共进化. ablations show removing any credit signal degrades evolution | single task-outcome signal可通过频域分解(slow/fast)同时归功selection和distillation,无需多个独立reward source。'co-evolution toward shared objective' 是关键
summary: 技能体系·三能力共进化 — 补'技能选择/利用/蒸馏'三能力解耦训练的真缺口
key_insights: single policy同时训练三能力, 共用task-outcome signal. low-frequency trend credits selection, high-frequency variation credits distillation(频域分解归功)
ALFWorld+WebShop超越prior skill-based和RL baselines. 训练动力学证实三能力共进化. ablations show removing any credit signal degrades evolution
single task-outcome signal可通过频域分解(slow/fast)同时归功selection和distillation,无需多个独立reward source。'co-evolution toward shared objective' 是关键
xihe_relevance: 曦和Skill自审+evolution_engine的三能力目前解耦(选/用/精分属不同组件)。Skill1证明可用单信号+频域分解同时训练——这与曦和'局部分解'的LHD哲学同构 | 融合落点: C. 补充 → skill_registry频域归功机制 (low-freq→selection, high-freq→distillation, task-outcome共用)
